description.value:
Trigger The lift is raised or lowered while at least one Small or larger creature stands on it

Effect Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:11]. This DC increases by 1 for each creature on the lift that's Medium, or by 4 for each Large creature. On a success, the lift operates normally that round, but on a failure, the anchor points give way, dropping the platform and all creatures on the lift into the shaft. A falling creature can arrest their fall by Grabbing an Edge to grab one of the swinging ropes (@Check[reflex|dc:33]), otherwise the creature takes normal falling damage plus an additional @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic]) from falling debris.

details.description: The anchor points in the platform's corners suddenly tear loose, causing the entire platform to collapse into the shaft below.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:32] (expert) or @Check[thievery|dc:35] (expert) to reinforce one of the anchor points; at least three of the four dangerous anchor points must be disabled to make the lift safe

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path: Bastion of Blasphemies
